summary: Tested CRM Offers tab and History tab features for Car Dealership CRM. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend UI testing verified: 1) Offers tab displays offer cards with old/new payment comparison correctly, 2) Clicking an offer card opens a detail modal with full comparison including ANCIEN DEAL, NOUVEAU PROGRAMME with rebates, COMPARAISON PAIEMENTS MENSUELS table for all 6 terms (36-96m), client's term highlighted, ECONOMIE DU CLIENT savings section, and action buttons (Fermer, Approuver & Envoyer), 3) History tab 'Ouvrir le calcul' button navigates to calculator without error (partial state restoration works for old submissions), 4) Backend POST /api/compare-programs returns offers with payments_by_term data for all 6 terms.
critical_code_review_comments: renderOfferDetailModal() correctly displays all sections: ANCIEN DEAL, NOUVEAU PROGRAMME, COMPARAISON PAIEMENTS MENSUELS table, ECONOMIE DU CLIENT
payments_by_term is correctly calculated in backend compare_programs_with_submissions() for all 6 terms (36,48,60,72,84,96)
openSubmissionInCalculator() correctly handles old submissions without calculator_state using partial state restoration
Client's original term is highlighted in the payment comparison table with a teal left border and asterisk
Offer modal shows Opt.2 column only when option2_rates exist in the program data
seed_data_creation: Used existing better offers data - 4 offers available
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRM Offers and History features fully tested. Offer detail modal shows complete comparison with payments_by_term for all 6 terms. History tab 'Ouvrir le calcul' works for both new submissions (full calculator_state) and old submissions (partial state restoration). Backend returns correct payments_by_term structure.

sections_verified: ANCIEN DEAL - shows old payment, rate, term
NOUVEAU PROGRAMME - shows rebates (Opt.1 Rabais, Opt.2 Rabais if available, Bonus)
COMPARAISON PAIEMENTS MENSUELS - table with all 6 terms (36,48,60,72,84,96)
Client term highlighted with teal border and asterisk
ECONOMIE DU CLIENT - shows old vs new payment and monthly/total savings
Action buttons - Fermer and Approuver & Envoyer
